attributes.class: login-class ng-untouched ng-pristine ng-valid ion-untouched ion-pristine ion-valid sc-ion-input-md-h sc-ion-input-md-s md input-label-placement-start in-item hydrated
ion-button-style md button button-round button-solid ion-activatable ion-focusable hydrated

reviewSummary.summary: The draft captures the primary login controls but contains duplicate password elements, noisy non-business elements, inconsistent semantic naming, and missing navigation and validation elements required for downstream automation quality.

issues.message: Two separate elements represent the same Password control. The ion-input wrapper duplicates the native input field and creates ambiguous ownership for downstream resources.
issues.suggested_fix: Keep only the native password input using locator id=ion-input-1 and remove the ion-input wrapper element.

issues.message: The element name 'password' is too generic and inconsistent with the approved naming convention already used for user_name_textbox.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename the element to password_textbox for semantic consistency and downstream keyword clarity.

issues.message: The background content div is a layout/decorative container and is not a business-significant workflow element.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the background_content element from the approved page model unless specifically needed for overlay-dismiss interaction behavior.

issues.message: The Login page Back button required by workflow navigation and return-path validation is missing from the approved elements.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a back_button element using locator id=auto_back_btn.

issues.message: The Login page Home button required by workflow navigation and unauthenticated return-state validation is missing from the approved elements.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a home_button element using locator id=auto_home_btn.

issues.message: The generic Failed authentication message required for all negative authentication scenarios is missing from the approved page model.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a generic_failed_authentication_message element using locator xpath=//*[contains(normalize-space(.),'Failed')].

issues.message: The locator depends entirely on visible button text and may become brittle if button wording changes.
issues.suggested_fix: Prefer a stable semantic id, automation attribute, or aria-based locator if available in the DOM.

issues.message: The ion-input wrapper element is classified as a textbox even though it primarily behaves as a component container around the actual input.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the wrapper element and keep only the native input textbox element.

issues.message: Authenticated Home state validation depends on authenticated user identity and authenticated-only feature visibility, but no corresponding downstream validation elements are identified in the workflow lineage.
issues.suggested_fix: Capture authenticated user identity display and authenticated-only feature area elements in the Home page model for stronger post-login validation.

approved_elements.name: password_textbox
approved_elements.description: Masked password entry field for authentication.

approved_elements.name: back_button
approved_elements.description: Returns the user to the Home page without authentication.

approved_elements.name: home_button
approved_elements.description: Navigates the user back to the Home page without authentication.

approved_elements.name: generic_failed_authentication_message
approved_elements.description: Generic authentication failure message displayed for invalid or rejected login attempts.
